eigenlayer.comment: stakeStrategy is EigenLayer's Sepolia WETH StrategyBase; the AVS operator set is created against it. stakeToken is unused for the demo (commitWinner only needs operator-set membership), so it is left zero.

pool.comment: currency0/currency1 are zero because DeployTestnet deploys two FaucetTokens and writes their real (address-sorted) addresses into the artifact. Both are 18-decimal; the pool starts at 1:1 and the off-chain FIXED_PRICE creates the arb gap, so price math is ordering-agnostic.

avs.comment: Single-operator demo quorum; raise for a multi-operator testnet.
